task_steps:
1. Configure Family Tree (Branch)
  2. Configure Family Tree (Branch) Photo
  3. Configure Family Tree (Branch) Descendants
  4. Display Family Tree (Branch) Descendant Names
  5. Data Entry: (Family Tree (Branch) Narrative
  6. Configure MyStory Link to Display: (Branch) Narrative
  7. Display Family Tree (Branch) Profile
task_price_frequency:
• Per (Root) Branch
  • One time Family Tree Branch Start/Up Charge.
  • Data Entry: (Family Tree (Branch) Narrative.

    [Limit 200 Words] - Up to 3 revisions allowed before additional charge due].

task_steps:
1. Enable Descendant (Pay Per Click)
  2. Display Descendant Profile on Click
task_price_frequency:
• Per (Descendant) Click.
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Descendant Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
  • If Deceased?

    An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased, Year Died, and Age at Death are also displayed

task_steps:

task_price_frequency:
